changesApplied.name: Elizabeth Brown
changesApplied.title: President & CEO
changesApplied.text: As we celebrate 150 years, I'm reminded that our mission has not changed — only the moment. Thank you for showing up for our community every single day.

changesApplied.subtext: Catch up on news, check your benefits, submit a request, and see what's happening across YWCA Columbus — all in one place.

stats.label: Staff on this mission with you
